landing.hero.title: Social media, but for people
landing.hero.subtitle: No ads. No algorithm. No data sales. Just a place to share joy and sorrow with the people who matter. Open source, owned by everyone, for everyone.
landing.why.title: Why Vonk exists
landing.why.intro: The big platforms have stopped being village squares and become shopping streets where you are the mannequin in the window. Vonk is different — no profit motive, no shareholders, no data sales.
landing.pillar1.title: You are not the product
landing.pillar1.body: End-to-end encryption on direct messages. Photo metadata (like GPS) is automatically stripped. IP addresses are deleted after 48 hours. No trackers, no fingerprinting. Full stop.
landing.pillar2.title: 100% open source
landing.pillar2.body: Every line of code is public, under AGPL-3.0. No hidden trackers, no hidden agenda. Every change is visible. Verify it yourself, or have someone you trust verify it.
landing.pillar3.title: Surplus goes to good causes
landing.pillar3.body: Donations cover hosting. Anything left over goes to organisations for world peace and health. The Vonk community votes each year on where it goes. No payout to shareholders — there aren't any.
landing.pillar4.title: Your pace, your feed
landing.pillar4.body: Chronological timeline. No engagement algorithm, no dopamine loops, no 'suggested for you'. And likes? Only the author sees how many people appreciated a post — you decide for yourself whether that should shape your mood.
landing.finances.title: Everything transparent
landing.finances.body: Every euro Vonk receives and spends is shown publicly. Donations, invoices, hosting costs, charity transfers — all live-readable by anyone. Soon at /open.
landing.cta2.title: Ready to try it?
landing.cta2.body: Still in alpha, but you're welcome. You can sign in with Google; Apple and GitHub follow later. You can always export everything or delete your account completely.
login.title: Welcome to Vonk
login.subtitle: Sign in with an account you already have. No passwords to remember, no spam.
login.more_providers: More providers go live as soon as their keys are registered.
onboarding.title: Let's set up your profile
username.label: Username
avatar.title: Show yourself
avatar.help: A photo of your face, or anything really. We strip EXIF metadata (like GPS coordinates) before storing it.
friends.title: Your first contacts
friends.help: On Vonk you follow the people you actually want to follow — never what an algorithm dictates. Full search and 'people you may know' arrive later this summer.
home.empty: Your feed is empty for now. Phase 2 is on the way: posting, following, stories.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
error.google_not_configured: Google login is not yet configured on the server.
